_note: Mock example only. Not generated from production data. Field names are illustrative and do not reflect the actual private schema.
_purpose: Show the shape of a structured denial. A denial is the system working as designed, not an error: it states what was blocked, why, and what would unlock it. See docs/trust-quartet.md (Refusals are not errors) and docs/threat-model.md.
_kind_note: kind=refusal means an intentional governance decision, distinct from kind=runtime_error (a post-execution failure).
what_blocked: An outbound web fetch was requested to enrich the meeting summary with an external source.
reason: The system is in Sovereign posture. Outbound access is denied regardless of capability tier.

what_unlocks.note: Connected access is Owner-initiated, time-bounded, and routed through the governed broker. The step would re-evaluate once a window is open and the network-health signal is fresh.
